vt_error_cases.expected_error: validity_temporal[absolute]: until must be after from

vt_error_cases.name: absolute_equal
vt_error_cases.expected_error: validity_temporal[absolute]: until must be after from

vt_error_cases.name: window_end_not_after
vt_error_cases.expected_error: validity_temporal[window]: end must be after start

vt_error_cases.name: from_not_string
vt_error_cases.expected_error: validity_temporal.from must be an ISO 8601 string

vt_error_cases.name: absolute_rfc822_from
vt_error_cases.expected_error: validity_temporal.from is not a valid ISO 8601 timestamp: Invalid isoformat string: 'Mon, 01 Jun 2026 00:00:00 GMT'

vt_error_cases.name: absolute_rfc1123_until

l3_meta_cases.name: vr_free_text

kwargs.value_range: I will pay $4,350 for the camera

l3_meta_cases.expected_error: value_range must be '<bucket>_<CURRENCY>' where bucket is one of ('0-100', '100-500', '500-1000', '1000-5000', '5000-10000', '10000-50000', '50000-100000', '100000-500000', '500000-1000000', '1000000+') and CURRENCY is a 3-letter uppercase code (e.g. '1000-5000_USD'); free-text values are rejected per SPEC §9.6.6 (attestations carry bucketed context, never raw deal terms)
